summary: Iteration 83 - Testing Achats Manager features (payment modes, reimbursements, cumul). All 11 backend tests pass. Frontend verified: Admin sees 'Achats Manager' tab with 3 sub-tabs (À acheter, Acheté, Cumul mode de paiement). Gérante correctly does NOT see 'Achats Manager' or 'Appro Manager' tabs.

issues: Minor React hydration warnings in console (span inside select/tbody) - cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: All Achats Manager backend endpoints working correctly:
- POST /api/expenses/{id}/mark-bought: Sets payment_mode, status=completed, is_paid=true, reimbursed=false for fonds_propres
- POST /api/expenses/{id}/reimburse-fonds-propres: Sets reimbursed=true, reimbursed_at, refuses if not fonds_propres or already reimbursed
- POST /api/expenses/reimburse-all-fonds-propres: Bulk reimburse all pending fonds_propres, returns count + total_amount
- GET /api/expenses/payment-mode-cumul: Returns correct structure with fonds_propres (total, count, reimbursed_*, pending_*) and caisse_restau (total, count)
- PUT /api/expenses/{id}: Accepts payment_mode, reimbursed, reimbursed_at, reimbursed_by in payload
- Admin: Sees 'Achats Manager' as 4th sub-menu in Achats with 3 sub-tabs
- Gérante: Does NOT see 'Achats Manager' sub-menu (only À valider, Validés, Historique)
- Gérante: Does NOT see 'Appro Manager' top-level tab
seed_data_creation: Test expenses created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 83 confirmed Achats Manager features are fully functional. Key behaviors tested: (1) mark-bought with fonds_propres/caisse_restau payment modes, (2) reimburse-fonds-propres individual and bulk, (3) payment-mode-cumul endpoint returns correct structure, (4) cash-closures/live snapshot includes fonds_propres fields, (5) PUT expenses accepts payment fields. Frontend role-based visibility: Admin sees Achats Manager tab, Gérante does not. Note: source field cannot be set via PUT /api/expenses/{id} - it's set internally when transferring from Appro Manager.
features_tested: PUT /api/expenses/{id} accepts payment_mode, reimbursed, reimbursed_at, reimbursed_by
Frontend: Admin sees Achats Manager tab with 3 sub-tabs
Frontend: Gérante does NOT see Achats Manager tab
Frontend: Gérante does NOT see Appro Manager tab
